text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Thank you for giving me
time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I do. I was worried about falling behind, so I did
some light exercise to maintain my condition.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: As it's said, in times of peace, prepare for strife.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's important to make good use of your time
off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Grass Wonder has remained vigilant
even on her day off.
